title: Gavin Newsom says Trump's Justice Department is investigating him
shortDescription: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said he is on President Donald Trump's "hit list," noting on social media that the Department of Justice is apparently investigating him and his wife.

title: Watch Trump news from the weekend as he starts the G7 Summit in France
shortDescription: Trump announced an Iran deal on June 14. Barron Trump made a rare appearance at UFC 250. The president is in France for the G7 summit. See Trump news.

title: Trump's name is off Kennedy Center, but why is a tarp blocking it?
shortDescription: President Trump's name is no longer on the Kennedy Center, but a massive tarp is blocking views of the restored sign on the building's facade.

title: Trump board loses Kennedy Center court fight. Are more defeats ahead? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: While a GOP-controlled Congress has not shown any strong interest in restraining the president’s executive power, the courts may decide otherwise.

title: Hegseth downplays concerns about US munitions stockpile
shortDescription: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth on June 14 called reports about the U.S. facing a shortage of munitions a "manufactured story."

title: Trump says Iran peace deal is 'complete.' Is the war over?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran is "complete." Here's where that leaves the war.

title: Supreme Court won't hear tariff challenge, paving way for new Trump action
shortDescription: Businesses argued the first Trump administration used a "loophole" to impose tariffs beyond what Congress intended. The Supreme Court rejected their appeal.

title: Trump endorses MAGA 'warrior' Mike Collins in Georgia Senate runoff
shortDescription: Rep. Mike Collins was endorsed by President Trump as a MAGA 'warrior' for the Republican U.S. Senate runoff race in Georgia. The runoff is on June 16.

title: Trump announces July 4 rally and 'historic' fireworks display
shortDescription: Trump announced he would hold a rally at the Lincoln Memorial on July 4 accompanied by military bands and a 'historic' fireworks display.

title: Trump family, present at UFC Freedom 250, wish patriarch happy 80th
shortDescription: President Donald Trump turned 80 years old on June 14. His entire family was present at the UFC Freedom 250 fight. Many also wished him a happy birthday.

title: A deal to end war in Iran
shortDescription: The Strait of Hormuz is expected to reopen on June 19.

title: Trump brings a bloody, on-brand birthday bash to White House UFC
shortDescription: President Trump sat ringside at the White House on his 80th birthday for a series of UFC matches that fit his own brand of combative politics.

title: Melania Trump skips usual suit for leather blazer at UFC Freedom 250
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump appeared with President Donald Trump at the UFC Freedom 250 event. While she often appears in a suit jacket, she wore this blazer.

title: Barron Trump makes rare appearance at White House UFC fight night
shortDescription: First son Barron Trump made an appearance at the White House UFC Freedom 250 event, only his second appearance at a family event since inauguration.

title: Trump says Iran peace deal is 'complete'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and Pakistan's prime minister announced that a deal to end the war with Iran has been reached.

title: See UFC cage fights shake up White House South Lawn
shortDescription: The White House set a dramatic scene for UFC’s $60 million Freedom 250 event on the South Lawn on June 14, 2026. See photos of the historic event.

title: White House UFC fights will go on 'rain or shine,' organizers say
shortDescription: UFC CEO Dana White dismissed concerns about severe weather ahead of its event at the White House, saying the fights would go on "no matter what."

title: Trump says Iran peace deal is 'complete.' What we know about it
shortDescription: "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," President Donald Trump said in a social media post. "Congratulations to all!"

title: Trump and family sit ringside for UFC fights at White House
shortDescription: After months of hype, President Donald Trump will be ringside Sunday for one of the most unusual events in White House history.

title: Trump's 80th birthday marked by peace talks, dinner and a cage match
shortDescription: Trump's birthday activities include peace talks with Iran, a family dinner at the White House and watching a UFC fight.

title: Trump at 80: Here's how the body changes with age
shortDescription: As Donald Trump turns 80 here is what brain, heart, and bone changes come with aging and how to stay healthy.
